## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / new tool
- [ ] Refactor (no behaviour change)

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` clean
- [ ] `pnpm test` all green (new code has tests)
- [ ] `pnpm lint` clean
- [ ] `pnpm build` succeeds
- [ ] README / examples updated if behaviour changed
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry added under `[Unreleased]`
